---
title: "git_spoke.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/git_spoke.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.90
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.95
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating GitSpoke, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import GitSpoke and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `GitSpoke`
- `__init__`
- `run_cmd`
- `is_clean`
- `ensure_branch`
- `restore_branch`
- `commit_changes`
